breakdown: This PR restructures tests to check shell script files (.github/scripts/skeptic-evaluate.sh) instead of workflow YAML for several gates, and updates evidence_utils.py paths from 'worldarchitectai' to 'worldarchitect.ai'. Tests were renamed for clarity (e.g., _in_script suffix). The core functionality described in the PR title ('synthesize rewards_box when level_up_complete=True but box missing') is not visible in this diff. Some test assertions were removed (e.g., PR_SHA checks) while new env var validation tests were added.
key_changes: Rename evidence_utils.py root path from 'worldarchitectai' to 'worldarchitect.ai'
Rename multiple test functions to specify _in_script or _in_yaml suffix
Restructure test assertions to check .github/scripts/skeptic-evaluate.sh instead of workflow YAML file
Add test_auto_merge_controls_are_restored_in_yaml to validate env vars in YAML
Remove some assertions from original tests (e.g., /commits/$PR_SHA checks)
Add isinstance() type checks for env var parsing in YAML
